title: athlete-enrollment — declared entitlements
description: Three entitlement keys. `athlete_enrollment_slot` (slot cap per season) matches athlete_slot at each tier. `athlete_enrollment_waitlist` (boolean) enables waitlist workflow when teams are at capacity. `athlete_enrollment_provisional` (boolean) enables provisional enrollment state for pending-consent scenarios past the deadline.

entitlements.description: Active enrollment cap PER SEASON. Small: 15 (matches athlete_slot — typically each athlete has one enrollment per season). Medium: 250. Enterprise: unlimited. Consumed on EnrollmentSubmitted (any non-terminal state counts). Released on EnrollmentCompleted / Withdrawn / Expelled / Expired. The per-season scoping means an athlete in Team A + Team B in the same season counts as TWO enrollments.
enforcedBy: TenantSubscription downgrade triggers a warning via reconciler; does not auto-cancel over-quota enrollments

entitlements.description: Enables the waitlist workflow. When ON, submissions to a team at capacity move to waitlisted status; PromoteWaitlistedEnrollmentsJob promotes the top of the queue when capacity opens. When OFF (Small default), submissions to a team at capacity refuse with TEAM_AT_CAPACITY (409).
enforcedBy: AthleteEnrollmentObserver.creating: when team is at capacity AND gate on, sets status='waitlisted' + waitlist_position; when gate off, refuses with TEAM_AT_CAPACITY
PromoteWaitlistedEnrollmentsJob no-ops for tenants without the entitlement
SDUI waitlist section hidden when features array does not include 'athlete_enrollment.waitlist'

entitlements.description: Enterprise-only. Enables enrollment_type='provisional' — creates enrollments in a pending-consent state past the deadline for regulatory-sensitive tenants. Provisional enrollments consume a slot + hold the roster position while consent is chased. Auto-expires after config.athlete_enrollment.provisional_ttl_days (default 14). When OFF (Small + Medium default), enrollment_type='provisional' is refused with ENROLLMENT_PROVISIONAL_NOT_ENTITLED.
enforcedBy: AthleteEnrollmentObserver.creating: refuses enrollment_type='provisional' when gate off
ExpireExpiredProvisionalEnrollmentsJob no-ops for tenants without the entitlement
SDUI provisional-enrollment option hidden when features array does not include 'athlete_enrollment.provisional'
